text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I find Bamboo Memory doing squats in my office.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Forty-eight... forty-nine... fifty! I can keep going!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
A student who broke the rules got away from me
earlier. I can't believe something like that wore
me out so much...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But I'll never let it happen again. This extra
training will see to that. Plus, it doubles as a
self-imposed punishment!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I have to maintain discipline at this school!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All of the back-to-back races have been affecting
her disciplinary committee efforts. I may need to
rethink her racing schedule.
